title: hecabe lutea
intro: Hecabe lutea, also known as Helenium, is a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Hecabe lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in salves and creams to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
